name: EVE Gate
description: In the system of New Eden sits the impenetrable EVE Gate. Thousands of years ago the forefathers of all the human races used the gate to travel to the world of EVE. But the gate has been closed for a

name: Amarr Home Worlds
description: Once, Amarr Prime was known as 'Athra', its name before the Amarr conquered the entire globe and began to carve out the greatest empire in New Eden. It is the original home world of the True Amarr, th

name: Amarr Empire

name: Minmatar Republic

name: Caldari State
description: The Caldari State is ruled by several mega-corporations. There is no central government to speak of - all territories within the State are owned and ruled by corporations. Duty and discipline are requ

name: Gallente Federation
description: The Gallente Federation encompasses several races, the Gallenteans the largest by far. The Federation is democratic and very liberal in a world full of dictators and oligarchies. The Caldari State was

name: Jove Empire

name: Ammatar

name: Khanid Kingdom
description: The Khanid Kingdom, the citizens of which are also known as the Dark Amarr, was founded a few centuries ago when the last Amarr Emperor was chosen. Khanid was one of the royal heirs at the time and, i

name: Fountain
description: The Fountain region was one of the first areas opened up to public colonization by CONCORD - it was intended to be the 'fountain of inter-stellar cooperation and prosperity'. Although the colonization

name: Curse
description: Curse is the old home of the Jove Empire. The Jovians departed their home centuries ago after the fall of their Second Empire and set themselves up in their current whereabouts to form the Third (and

name: Great Wildlands
description: The Great Wildlands area has been the bastard child of all the empires at some stage. During the Minmatar Rebellion it acted as a base for Minmatar guerillas and was also the avenue through which the

name: The Syndicate
description: The Syndicate is the home of the Intaki Syndicate, an independent organization of exiles from the Gallente Federation. The members of the Syndicate are not pirates as such, but rather unscrupulous bus

name: Outer Ring
description: The Outer Ring is a mineral rich area controlled by Outer Ring Excavations, which was the first company to start operating in the system. The Outer Ring Excavations (or ORE) is an independently run mi

name: Stain
description: The home of Sansha's lost dream of utopia. True slaves once stood legion here, strong and unassailable, or so the Nation presumed. That presumption was crushed when the empires joined forces, for the

name: Venal
description: The Venal region lies far from empire space and few roam there except those that have direct business with the Guristas. The Guristas is a clan of pirates, though they like to describe themselves as '

name: The Cauldron
description: In the Cauldron the remnants of several supernovas render the space unstable and treacherous. Filled with volatile gravity currents and large chunks of stellar debris the whole area is much too danger

name: Trace Cosmos
description: The fields of Trace Cosmos hold miniscule black holes and weird spatial rifts, making it much too dangerous to traverse. It is widely believed that the fields are the remnants of a massive collision b

name: Point of no Return
description: Point of no Return is a small black hole located not far from empire space. First noted by Amarr astronomers, according to their records, they named the black hole "Duzna Kah" or "Fallen Beyond Hope".

name: Black Rise
description: Black Rise is a frontier region of the Caldari State, and the latest area of space to be colonized by them. Previously, the region was classed as an inexplicable black void, believed to be without mas

name: Divinity's Edge
description: In the early stages of Amarr expansion through space they encountered Divinity's Edge – a huge void with little in the way of star systems or other stellar bodies. For some time they believed this was

name: Vapor Sea
description: Vapor Sea, also known as Crib of Stars, is a melding pot of gaseous clouds where new stars are being born. Although new stars and solar systems are still millions of years away the area is of great in

name: Pool of Radiance
description: Space holds many spectacular sights and few are as spectacular as the crystal-clouds in the Pool of Radiance. The Pool is illuminated by surrounding stars, which makes it shimmer and shine in every co

name: Cord of the Elements
description: Winding through the Syndicate region is a natural phenomenon that has baffled scientists for centuries. The phenomenon, a super-dense dark cloud, bends time in such a way that all space-travel in or c

name: Ginnungagap
description: Ginnungagap is a huge black hole at the edge of Minmatar space. It is the largest black hole close to civilized space. The black hole has already rendered several solar systems close to it uninhabitab

name: Golgothan Fields
description: The Minmatar Rebellion saw many battles, both on ground and in space. The largest of the space battles took place in the Ennur system a few weeks after the start of the rebellion. The main Amarr battl

name: The Myridian Strip
description: Several decades ago the Amarr Empire was desperate to improve their relations with the other empires, mainly to increase trade and tourism. One of the projects they embarked on was to build the Myridi

name: R55 Colonial Ruins

name: Serpent's Coil
description: The Serpent's Coil is at once one of the most exotic and most dangerous of all space locations in the vast world of EVE. It is currently inhabited by agents of the Serpentis Corporation, which use the

name: The Traumark Installation
description: The Traumark Installation is a massive fortress complex that stands as a sentinel overlooking the southern reaches of the Amarr Empire and the border between the Empire and Sansha's Nation. The histor

name: City of God
description: Built by the megalomaniac emperor Zaragram II some 2000 years ago, intended to be the home of the living god, namely himself. Zaragram set out to uproot and eradicate many of the most sacred tradition

name: Okkelen
description: A sparsily populated constellation in the middle of the Caldari State. Long since claimed by pirates and smugglers, the State is now launching a concentrated effort to wrench control of the constellat

name: Ani
description: Former home of the Nefantar tribe, now better known as the Ammatars, the Ani constellation has been largely ignored by the Republic. But the Republic badly needs to bolster its public image, and what

name: Algintal
description: The Algintal constellation is a natural beauty spot. Sporting several spectacular natural phenomena of breath-taking splendor, it was once one of the main tourist attractions in the Federation. But be

name: Araz
description: The Araz constellation typifies the feudal system found throughout the Amarr Empire. Wherever widely different ambitions and talents meet a power surge is inevitable. Uriam Kador, one of the five roya

name: Kenobanala
description: A political crisis has encouraged the Amarr to militarize the zone between Kenobanala and Audesder, along with their allies, the Khanid Kingdom, Ammatar Mandate and Caldari State.

name: Audesder
description: Amarr militarization of nearby Kenobanala has forced the Minmatar and their allies to hastily build up a defensive perimeter inside Audesder.

name: E-8CSQ
description: The Caldari State have found something significant in G5ED-Y. The State military has set up a huge base of operations in that system, and its presence there is thick as sour milk. The Guristas on the

name: 09-4XW

name: 9HXQ-G

name: OK-FEM

name: Pegasus

name: Assilot

name: I-3ODK

name: 760-9C
